name: io.github.miguelferre/human-ai-governance
description: Audit the human-AI interaction layer of an AI system against HAX-18 and PAIR: evidence-anchored findings on over-trust, automation bias, correction and alert timing, mapped to the EU AI Act and NIST AI RMF.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key for the cloud model. Not needed if you set LLM_BACKEND=ollama for a fully local run.

environmentVariables.name: LLM_BACKEND
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'ollama' to run the whole pipeline locally with an open model (no data leaves the machine). Defaults to Anthropic (cloud).
